title: Ultimate PVP Client
description: A hypixel focused 1.8.9 mod pack. Preloaded with resourcepacks!
body: A hypixel focused Minecraft 1.8.9 mod pack. With preloaded resource packs featuring PVP packs for bedwars and UHC or menu revamps. The pack features discord rich presence and a cosmetics system! It has also been optimized so you can play the game to its fullest potential. It also features OneConfig, a mod library that you would see on a client like Lunar Client.
